name: Seeing Machines Limited
summary: Seeing Machines Limited provides driver monitoring technologies in Australia, North America, the Asia Pacific, Europe, and internationally. It operates in two segments, OEM and Aftermarket. The company offers operator monitoring and intervention sensing technologies and services for the automotive, mining, transport, and aviation industries. It develops, sells, and licenses products, services, and technology to detect and manage driver fatigue and distraction; and develops driver-monitoring technology to be incorporated into passenger cars. The company serves automotive, aviation, fleet/guardian, off-road, and rail markets. Seeing Machines Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Fyshwick, Australia.
